title: Miro app integration query
excerpt:
Hi, 
I would love to integrate my Miro account to Monday. I’ve done that but when I click on the widget to Sign in to choose a Miro board The hyperlink isn’t working it turns bright blue but nothing else. Am I missing so…

posts.author: Jacquijames (Jacqui James)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I would love to integrate my Miro account to Monday. I’ve done that but when I click on the widget to Sign in to choose a Miro board The hyperlink isn’t working it turns bright blue but nothing else. Am I missing something. I’d love to know how I can start using the app.

Thanks so much
Jacqui

posts.author: nh44s (Noah Haas)
posts.cookedHtml: I had this issue in the MacOS app. I used Monday with my web browser and was able to log in there. Once I was logged in the Mac OS app updated as well.
